Petition For Order Confirming Estate Assets
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Payment Of Bond Premium
Off Calendar Aug-15-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Czech appeared by telephone for Administrator.
Paul Fazio (Bond Agent) of H.M. Vreeland & Son Insurance Agency.

Mr. Fazio stated that the bond premiums have been paid as of yesterday and provided an endorsed copy of the withdrawal of notice of non-payment. Mr. Czech stated that the bond amount of $166,000.00 should be adequate and that the appraisal of $356,000.00 is for 100% of the property. Status on payment of bond premium is off calendar. The Court reminds Counsel of his Client's responsibility of maintaining the bond.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Payment Of Bond Premium
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Aug-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Estate Assets
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Czech appeared by telephone for (Petitioner).
Marlene Getchell appeared by telephone for Ernest Morgan.

The Court noted that the civil case is still pending, that there has been no response to the Probate Examiner's notes and that the bond premiums have not been paid. Ms. Getchell stated that the quiet title action is in discovery, that she would like to keep this case on the back burner in the event they are unsuccessful in the quiet title case and that she is not prepared to dismiss her petition. Mr. Czech stated that he concurs, suggest putting the matter out for six months, stated that he would like to put this matter on hold and that Ms. Johnson is working on the catching up on the bond. The Court noted that it is not clear as to whether the appraised value of $356,000.00 is for 100% of the property or for the Decedent's one third interest, and questions whether bond is sufficient. Mr. Czech stated that he believes bond is sufficient. The Court reminded Mr. Czech that it is his Client's responsibility to make sure bond is adequate and to submit what ever facts there are as to any deficiencies. Ms. Getchell stated that they have claims in Probate that are different from the quiet title action. The Petition for Order Confirming Estate Assets is continued to January 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on payment of bond premium is continued to August 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to make sure bond is brought current and that bond is for the correct amount.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
